# Play Claim Board — Community Build Queue

> **GitHub Projects Board**: This file defines plays available for community contributors to build.
> Track progress at: [github.com/frootai/frootai/projects](https://github.com/frootai/frootai/projects)

## How It Works

1. **Browse** the unclaimed plays below
2. **Claim** by opening an issue using the [New Solution Play template](https://github.com/frootai/frootai/issues/new?template=new-solution-play.yml)
3. **Build** following the DevKit + TuneKit + SpecKit structure
4. **Submit PR** using the [PR template](../.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)

## Play Status Legend

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| ✅ Complete | Play shipped with DevKit + TuneKit + fai-manifest.json |
| 🔄 In Progress | Someone is actively building this play |
| 🟢 Available | Open for community to claim and build |
| 🔒 Reserved | Reserved for core team |

## Contribution Requirements

Every community play must include:

1. **fai-manifest.json** — FAI Protocol wiring (context + primitives + guardrails)
2. **README.md** — Architecture overview, services, getting started
3. **.github/** — DevKit (19 Agentic OS files)
4. **config/** — TuneKit (AI configuration files)
5. **infra/** — Bicep IaC templates
6. **evaluation/** — Quality scoring (eval.py + test-set.jsonl)

Run `npm run validate:primitives` before submitting. See the [PR Template](../.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) for the full checklist.
